result: The R script has been successfully executed and the cleaned data file has been created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The file contains the NSID variable along with the eight GHQ-12 derived variables: ghq15, ghq17, ghq25, ghq32 (pre-derived scores harmonized to standard missing value codes) and ghqtl15, ghqtl17, ghqtl25, ghqtl32 (manually computed sum scores from item-level data). All derived GHQ variables have been converted to factors with standard missing value code labels applied.
